Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2024-02-10, 2024-02-11, 2024-01-29, 2024-02-07, 2024-01-27, 2024-02-12, 2024-01-31, 2024-01-28. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




This page contains reports that are tested or are known to produce false positives. Be careful with using this data.
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a television station
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a physical process
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an event
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a belief
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an education (transmission of knowledge and skills)
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to a television station
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to a physical process
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to an event
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to an intentional human activity

  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to an education (transmission of knowledge and skills)

  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a behavior
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a belief
  • no longer existing brand (according to Wikidata) - and marked as active shop in OSM, with tagging referring to defunct one

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a television station
linked wikidata entry (Q278194) is about a television station, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or brand:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a belief
linked wikidata entry (Q3656641) is about a belief, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or name:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a belief
linked wikidata entry (Q4723487) is about a belief, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or name:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Alfred Street Baptist Church - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(104625285)['wikidata'='Q4723487']; way(1102826029)['wikidata'='Q4723487']; way(136162190)['wikidata'='Q113653915']; way(242066752)['wikidata'='Q12293209']; way(78492654)['wikidata'='Q4240411']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a belief']


no longer existing brand (according to Wikidata) - and marked as active shop in OSM, with tagging referring to defunct one
Wikidata claims that assigned brand object no longer exists. That means that either this shop is gone or it is rebranded. Or brand:wikidata tag is wrong. Historical, no longer existing object should not be mapped in OSM. REMEMBER TO VERIFY! WIKIDATA QUALITY MAY BE POOR! WIKIDATA MUST NOT BE USED AS SOURCE! ALWAYS VERIFY!
wikidata Q1533254 is marked as dissolved
MARKTKAUF - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(25943120)['wikidata'='Q1533254']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['no longer existing brand (according to Wikidata) - and marked as active shop in OSM, with tagging referring to defunct one']
